text:
In the first image, I stand before a glass-walled room, observing the quiet hum of preparation and technology, a reminder of the collaboration and structure behind every gathering. The tilted perspective makes me feel slightly off-balance, as if on the cusp of stepping between order and chaos.

The second image surrounds me with the electric colors and stylized text of an exhibition space. The promise of innovation and progress buzzes in the air. Here, amidst the talk of research and development, I feel a childlike curiosity awaken, eager to unravel what it means for humans to connect and coexist with intelligence, both human and artificial. In both places, I am an observer touching the edge of structured knowledge and creative possibility.
